description: Overrides and additional patterns for git history scanning. Uses SECRET_SCAN patterns as base, with these additions for commit-specific detection.

patterns.name: Deleted Secret in History
patterns.description: A secret was committed and then removed — still exists in git history
patterns.remediation: 1. Rotate the credential immediately (it is compromised). 2. Use BFG Repo Cleaner or git filter-branch to rewrite history. 3. Force-push the cleaned history. 4. Add pre-commit hooks to prevent recurrence.

patterns.name: Suspicious Commit Message
patterns.description: Commit message suggests a secret was previously committed
patterns.remediation: Review the commit and its parent to verify the secret was properly rotated.
